nasb.text: Five curtains shall be joined to one another, and the other five curtains shall be joined to one another.

esv.text: Five curtains shall be coupled to one another, and the other five curtains shall be coupled to one another.

cnv.text: 其中五幅幔子要彼此相連，另外五幅幔子也要彼此相連。

ccb.text: 每五幅连在一起，形成两幅大幔子。
